title: ecbolium nothum
intro: Ecbolium nothum, also known as the false false chamomile, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium nothum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. Ecbolium nothum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules for its medicinal benefits, with the leaves and flowers being the most commonly used parts.
